profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa, Tbk operates as a food and beverage company in Indonesia. The company trades and distributes syrups, fruit mixes, sauces, and powders; and coffee products. It offers almond milk, soy milk, coconut milk, dairy milk, and free lactose milk, as well as macadamia plant based and oat dairy alternative products. In addition, the company manufactures non-dairy creamer; commercial blenders; coffee, tea, slush, and juice machines; and hot water and soybean milk dispensers, etc. It sells its products under the MONIN, LAVAZZA, MILKLAB, Dreamy, BOBA KING, SANTINO KAV, izy, JTC OmniBlend, Straw Me, and i Pilot brand names. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia. PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa, Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Dima Investindo.
